200.description: AI SDK v5 UI-message stream (SSE) replaying the active run

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keyword to match against chat titles and message content.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matching chats to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of latest messages to return.

parameters.name: beforeSeq
parameters.description: Return messages strictly before this sequence number.

400.description: Malformed chat id or invalid history pagination query

404.description: Chat not found or not owned

400.description: Malformed chat id or invalid message body

404.description: Chat not found or not owned

409.description: Message id already exists, or another run is already in flight for this chat

503.description: Model catalog is not configured correctly

404.description: Chat not found, not owned, or the fork-point message (when given) is absent

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of latest messages to return.

parameters.name: beforeSeq
parameters.description: Return messages strictly before this sequence number.

404.description: Chat not found or not public
Chat not found or not public

503.description: Model catalog is not configured correctly

404.description: Run not found or not owned
Run not found or not owned

parameters.name: after_sequence
parameters.description: Replay strictly after this event sequence (the SSE `id:` of the last event seen).

200.description: Server-sent events; each frame: id = event sequence, data = {sequence, eventType, payload, createdAt}

404.description: Run not found or not owned

409.description: Duplicate name, or at the per-user prompt cap
Rename collides with an existing prompt

404.description: Parent unit not found / not visible
Org unit not found / not visible

403.description: Caller lacks the admin-tier this update requires

404.description: Org unit (or the target parentId) not found / not visible

422.description: Cannot move an org unit into its own subtree

404.description: Org unit not found / not visible

409.description: Org unit still has child units

404.description: Org unit not found / not visible

403.description: Caller lacks admin-tier on this org unit or an ancestor (owner-tier for role "owner")

404.description: User or org unit not found

409.description: User is already a member of this unit

403.description: Caller lacks the admin/owner-tier this role change requires

409.description: Would demote the last owner of a root org unit

403.description: Caller is neither the member nor admin/owner-tier here

409.description: Would remove the last owner of a root org unit

404.description: Org unit not visible, or caller holds no role on its path

token.description: Opaque bearer token. Stored server-side only as a SHA-256 hash.

snippet.description: Excerpt from the first matching user/assistant message; null for a title-only match.

absorbedMessageCount.description: Messages absorbed by this compaction (uptoSeq minus the previous compaction's uptoSeq, or uptoSeq itself for the first one).

beforeTokens.description: The summarization call's input token count.

afterTokens.description: The summarization call's output (summary) token count.

uptoSeq.description: Messages with seq <= this were summarized for model context.

modelId.description: Opaque llame model id selected for this turn.

visibility.description: Sharing: 'public' exposes a read-only link at /shared/:id; 'private' revokes it.

pinned.description: Pin the chat to the top of the sidebar (true) or unpin (false).

fromMessageId.description: Copy up to (and including) this message. Omit to fork the whole conversation.

settings.description: Opaque node-scoped settings (SPEC §7.2); replaces the whole object. Interpretation is the config resolver’s job (#46).

parentId.description: Move under this parent id. Explicit null promotes the unit to root. Omit to leave the unit where it is.

inherited.description: True when the role comes from an ancestor, not the unit itself.
